statement: Today I escaped anxiety. Or no, I discarded it, because it was within me, in my own perceptions — not outside.
author: Marcus Aurelius
primary_source: Meditations IV.3 (tr. Gregory Hays, 2002 — short excerpt; PD alternative: Long 1862 same passage)
verified_via: Meditations 4.3; verified against Long PD: 'Today I have got out of all trouble, or rather I have cast out all trouble, for it was not outside, but within and in my opinions.'
